title: Case/Care Management * Refugees/Entrants/Asylees - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Case/Care Management * Refugees/Entrants/Asylees 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Deafness Disabilities Issues Hard of Hearing Older Adults Hispanic/Latino Community Immigrants Refugees/Entrants/Asylees Homeless Veterans Veterans Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES EUGENE REFUGEE AND IMMIGRANT SERVICES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides social services case management for asylum seekers, refugees, and others with immigration status for help with food, transportation, health services, OHP (Oregon Health Plan), RCA (Refugee Cash Assistance), SNAP (Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program ), TANF (Temporary Assistance for Needy Families ), WIC (Women, Infants and Children), and other services. Also provides employment and legal services. 1464 W 6th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Varies according to program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 345-3628 1326 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES SPRINGFIELD REFUGEE AND IMMIGRANT SERVICES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides social services case management for asylum seekers, refugees, and others with immigration status for help with food, transportation, health services, OHP (Oregon Health Plan), RCA (Refugee Cash Assistance), SNAP (Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program ), TANF (Temporary Assistance for Needy Families ), WIC (Women, Infants and Children), and other services. Also provides employment and legal services. 1025 G Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Varies according to program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 345-3628 1326 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY REFUGEE AND IMMIGRANT SERVICES PROGRAM CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY REFUGEE AND IMMIGRANT SERVICES PROGRAM
